series_metadata.series_title: Motorcycle Ohio Program skill waiver and course completion cards
series_metadata.series_description: The Motorcycle Ohio Program issues each student a completion card upon the successful completion of the Basic Rider Course (BRC) or the Basic Rider Course Returning Rider class (BRC-RR). The course completion card (MOP0014) is issued with a control number and verified in the BASS system by the BMV and enables a student to bypass the skills exam and obtain a motorcycle endorsement.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 years ; Electronic: 5 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
